chain.thought: Explanation: Count the number of rows where the Position column is “1st”. These occur in rows 2, 5, 6, 11, and 12, totaling 5 times.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The question refers to how many times "1st" appears in the position column. Counting occurrences of "1st":
- 2000 World Junior Championships (400 m hurdles) – 1st
- 2002 European Indoor Championships (400 m) – 1st
- 2002 European Indoor Championships (4x400 m relay) – 1st
- 2003 European U23 Championships (400 m hurdles) – 1st
- 2003 European U23 Championships (4x400 m relay) – 1st
There are 5 instances of "1st".
